name: Caroline Cochran
background: Caroline Cochran is the co-founder and Chief Operating Officer of Oklo. She has been a director of Oklo since its inception in 2013. She has experience in operations and risk management. She holds an M.S. in Nuclear Engineering from the Massachusetts Institute of Technology and a B.A. in Economics and B.S. in Mechanical Engineering from the University of Oklahoma.

company_affiliations.name: Oklo Inc.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Co-Founder, Chief Operating Officer, and Director
